caveats: The raw Pixal3D mesh remains a high-polygon research candidate and requires the normal LOD gate before Unreal import.
decisions.notes: Front/back/side/top/quarter evidence shows a coherent tabby, a straight longitudinal body axis, head aligned with the torso, four usable grounded limbs, one tail, preserved texture, and no large holes. Approved only for LOD and species-rig binding; animation remains unapproved.
